content:
QBR SUMMARY
Customer: Meridian Health Systems
Customer ID: C001
Contract ID: K013
Account Executive: Sarah Chen
Period: H2 2024 (July – December 2024)
Meeting Date: January 20, 2025
Attendees: Sarah Chen (AE), Dr. Linda Forsythe (Director of Clinical Operations), Dr. Marcus Hill (CMO), Kevin Marsh (IT Coordinator)

BUSINESS PERFORMANCE
Meridian closed 2024 as their strongest year operationally. All three facilities operating at above-target capacity. The clinical operations team grew to 42 staff members. Planning underway for a potential fourth facility in 2026.

PLATFORM USAGE
38 of 40 licensed users active. The 2 inactive licenses are held for new hires expected in Q1 2025. Weekly report generation at 89 reports per week. 24 custom dashboards in active use.

KEY DISCUSSION POINTS
- EHR integration beta completed successfully in Q4 2024 — Meridian was one of the first customers to complete the beta. Dr. Hill described the integrated data flow as exceeding expectations, eliminating the weekly manual export entirely
- Dr. Hill is now the internal champion for expanding InsightIQ usage beyond clinical operations into the broader administrative team
- Compliance team confirmed the tamper-evident audit log export (released Q4 2024) meets their regulatory requirements — Kevin Marsh submitted documentation to their accreditation body
- Fourth facility planning: Dr. Forsythe expects to need 8-10 more users when the fourth facility opens, targeted for 2026

SATISFACTION RATING: 5/5
Dr. Hill: "The EHR integration changed what this platform means for us. We went from a reporting tool to a real-time operations platform. This is now core infrastructure."

ACTION ITEMS
- Sarah Chen to prepare 2025 renewal proposal for 40 users with fourth facility expansion path documented
- Kevin Marsh to share accreditation audit log outcome with Sarah Chen for use as a case study (pending Dr. Hill's approval)
- Schedule fourth facility planning conversation for Q3 2025

NEXT QBR: July 2025
